title: clang attributes check: update report conditions
body:
This PR updates clang attributes check script to fix found issues where script won't report attributes mismatch:

- Now constructors are no longer always MT-safe. Constructor is MT-safe only if it calls only local methods or MT-safe functions.
- Fix case where script won't check function call that was made inside another function call
- No longer assume that all calls on function arguments are MT-safe. Function argument must not be pointer or reference to be consider MT-safe.
